name: Marigold
dialogue.Introduction: Oh no! A human! $6#$e#Wait, are you the one who tends to the land near the lake? $7#$b#I think I can trust you.. $7#$b#I'm Marigold, what's your name? $u#$b#@ huh? I'll try and remember that! $h
dialogue.divorced: @.. Why are you here? $7#$b#Can't you just leave me alone? $s#
dialogue.breakUp: These flowers.. They're dead.. $s#b#Wait.. Is this a human custom? $7#$b#You're breaking up with me? $s#b#I thought we had something special.. $s#b#I can't speak to anymore right now. $s
dialogue.GreenRain: It's green! $7#$b#The frogs love it, but I'm not so sure.. $7
dialogue.GreenRain_2: Green again! $7#$b#I guess it's slightly less scary this year.. $7
dialogue.GreenRainFinished: I'm glad the green stopped.. $b#So strange.. $7
dialogue.dating_Marigold: These flowers are beautiful! $u#$b#Oh! You want to be together? $l#$b#Yes! Let's do it! $l
dialogue.Marigold_Engaged: This is pretty! $h#$b#Wait, it means marriage? $7#$b#Of course I'll marry you! $u
dialogue.Mon: A fresh week! $b#Do you have any plans? $h$b#Me? I'm going to check on the slimes and see how they're getting on!
dialogue.Tue: My frogs told me you're kind#$7#$b#So I think I can trust you
dialogue.Wed: What are you growing right now? $b#Any flowers?
dialogue.Thu: Oh you're back. $b#Do you visit all the magical creatures around town?
dialogue.Fri: Have you noticed that strange woman that hangs out near the woods on Fridays? $7#$b#I always feel a magical aura emitting from her.
dialogue.Sun: Have you seen that tower in the forest? $7#$b#A wizard? $6#$b#No wonder I feel such a magical aura over there.
dialogue.Mon2: Humans are so fascinating.. $7#$b#The way you care for your young with outside help.. $7#$b#Fairies don't learn from anyone other than their parents.
dialogue.Tue2: I was thinking about Old Master Cannoli today. $b#My mother always believed in the good of people. $b#I think he helped her to believe. $h
dialogue.Wed2: One of my favourite places is a village called Everglade. $h#$b#I don't often go because it's such a long flight. $8
dialogue.Fri2: I've been watching people from afar for a while now.. $7#$b#Your customs are fascinating.
dialogue.Sat2: I think I might head to the forest today to look for honey. $h
dialogue.Sun2: Frances was telling me the funniest story! $9#$b#You know Frances! The orange frog? $9
dialogue.Mon4: The green animals that live in near Cannoli's statue are so strange.. $7
dialogue.Tue4: Have you met the frogs, Petal, Leaf, Frances and Little Chub? $h#$b#I guess you can't talk to them huh? $7
dialogue.Wed4: I've been collecting materials for my paint! $b#Maybe one day I can paint something for you! $h
dialogue.Thu4: I was thinking about humans again today.. $8#$b#I think there's so much I don't understand about your kind still.
dialogue.Fri4: I'm struggling with new ideas to paint.. $8#$b#Maybe I should go on a flight for inspiration.
dialogue.Sat4: La la la la $u#$b#Oh @! $6#$b#Sorry I didn't see you! I was just singing to the butterflies!
dialogue.Sun4: I spoke to the magical woman with the pig today $b#She tried to buy my dust $a#I don't trust her $8
dialogue.Mon6: What's the latest gossip in town? $7#$b#Just because I'm scared of humans doesn't mean I'm not curious.. $8
dialogue.Tue6: Fairy magic? $u#$b#I mainly use my magic for keeping my butterfly and frog friends alive. $u#$b#I know everything is supposed to live and die in a cycle, but they're my friends.
dialogue.Wed6: Will you tell me about the animals on your farm? $7
dialogue.Thu6: Sometimes I forget that you don't really have any magic. $b#At least, humans don't naturally.
dialogue.Fri6: Fairies love sugar $h#$b#In case you were wondering $9
dialogue.Sat6: Cannoli's statue was looking a bit grungy, so I cleaned it up this morning! $9
dialogue.Sun6: Ever wonder why Little Chub is called Little Chub? $b#It was a childhood nickname that stuck after he ate an entire swarm! $6
dialogue.Mon8: My mother used to tell me stories about human eating habits. $7#$b#Is it true you eat some rocks? $6#$b#I think one's called 'salt'?$6
dialogue.Tue8: Have you met the shadow man in the sewers, Krobus? $b#Shadow people and fairies have always lived in harmony together $h
dialogue.Wed8: I think all the humans in your town can be trusted. $7#$b#Except for the man in the tower.. He seems like he collects magic. $7
dialogue.Thu8: The frogs have names, but the butterflies don't. $b#Names just aren't a part of their culture.
dialogue.Fri8: It's the town dance night right? $7#$b#I think I'll join tonight!
dialogue.Sat8: @ you're my closest friend! $9#$b#Don't tell the frogs.. $7
dialogue.Sun8: Krobus and I have been talking about how we can both get more comfortable around humans.
dialogue.Mon10: I feel more comfortable around humans now, I want to thank you for that @!
dialogue.Tue10: @, you're really special to me. $u#$b#I'm glad you keep visiting me. $9
dialogue.Thu10: @, my butterflies are really excited about us and what we can become! $l#$b#
dialogue.Fri10: You deserve to relax this weekend! $h#$b#Here I hope this speeds some of your tasks up![(0)872]
dialogue.Sat10: Maybe we should go on a date soon? $l#$b#I'll think of something!
dialogue.Sun10: I was flying last night and I found this on the ground, I want to you to have it![(0)64]
engagement.Marigold0: I can't believe I am about to be married!$h
engagement.Marigold1: I hope I don't get cold feet
rain.Marigold: It's really coming down today, the frogs love it! $9
marriage.patio_Marigold: I'm glad I could bring some of my friends with me here. $h
marriage.Rainy_Day_0: It's raining.. $7#$b#The flowers will be thriving, tomorrow will be a great day to collect some materials for my paints. $9
marriage.Rainy_Day_1: I was going to help you water the crops this morning, but I guess the rain has it covered! $h
marriage.Rainy_Day_2: Today feels like a good day to paint! $h
marriage.Rainy_Day_3: Look at that rain! At least you don't have to water your crops today.
marriage.Rainy_Day_4: Hey, another rainy day... perfect. $e#You look cold... here, come closer.$l
marriage.Rainy_Night_0: Hi honey! $l#$b#Did you have a productive day?
marriage.Rainy_Night_1: Ok potions replenished, ingredients stocked..$u#$b#Oh sorry dear, I didn't see you there.$h#$b#How was your day?
marriage.Rainy_Night_2: Welcome home honey! I made you some dinner.[(0)222]$h
marriage.Rainy_Night_3: Hi honey, did you go down the mines today?$h#$e#You look tired, why don't we go to bed?
marriage.Rainy_Night_4: @ come dry out! $b#Let's spend some time together before you have to head to sleep!
marriage.Indoor_Day_0: I had some extra painting materials lying around, here take some! [(0)296]
marriage.Indoor_Day_1: Hey... I made coffee! [395]$h#$e#I hope it gives you a boost today! $h
marriage.Indoor_Day_2: How are the crops this year? $b#Let me know if you'd like me to cook them into something delicious!
marriage.Indoor_Day_3: You know, the greenhouse would make a great butterfly house! $9
marriage.Indoor_Day_4: Are you going to the mines today? Here, this could help! [(0)340]
marriage.Indoor_Night_0: I spent all day cleaning today! How's it look? $h
marriage.Indoor_Night_2: I love it here, but I do miss the woods sometimes.
marriage.Indoor_Night_3: You know what this place needs? $h#$b#More frogs! $9
marriage.Indoor_Night_4: Have you ever thought about making the house.. more mushroomy?
marriage.Outdoor_0: It's so fresh out here today!
marriage.Outdoor_1: I love being in nature again! $9
marriage.Outdoor_2: I love seeing all the plants you grow, you work so hard.$h
marriage.Outdoor_3: I'm just taking in some fresh air, I always feel at home when I'm outside. $h
marriage.Outdoor_4: Can you smell the pollen? It's positively radiating through the air! $9
marriage.OneKid_0: Do you think %kid1 has any fairy magic?
marriage.OneKid_1: I wonder if %kid1 will develop wings when they grow up?
marriage.OneKid_3: %kid1 was so funny yesterday, you should have seen them!
marriage.TwoKids_0: %kid1 and %kid2 are really being a handful! $7#$b#Who knew parenting was such hard work!
marriage.TwoKids_1: I think %kid2 has some fairy magic.. This fell off them yesterday! [(0)872]
marriage.TwoKids_2: Do you think you'll take %kid1 and %kid2 to the mines with you one day when they're older?$7
marriage.TwoKids_3: It may be hard work, but I love our full family! $9
marriage.Good_0: Remember when you first found my mushroom? $l#$b#It must have been quite the shock! $l
marriage.Good_1: Hey... come here. You look great today.$h
marriage.Good_2: You smell great, you remind me of some of my favourite flowers. $h
marriage.Good_3: I'm so happy we got here together! I can't imagine my life without you. $h
marriage.Good_4: You work so hard! I'm lucky to have someone who takes care of me so well!
marriage.Good_5: I'm glad you helped me become who I am today. $l#b#Imagine if I was still scared of everyone!
marriage.Good_6: Here you should use this so you can spend more time with me today![(0)872] $9
marriage.Good_8: Every day feels wonderful when I'm with you. $h
marriage.Good_9: Marrying you was the greatest decision I ever made!
marriage.Neutral_0: I might fly around a bit today, I need to clear my head.
marriage.Neutral_2: I'm a bit busy right now, let's catch up later.
marriage.Neutral_3: I wish I had some more friends in the valley.. $8
marriage.Neutral_4: There are too many chores, I know you do a lot on the farm, but could you wash your dishes before you leave?
marriage.Neutral_5: Are we doing okay on money? Maybe I could try selling some of my art.. $8
marriage.Neutral_6: Do you ever feel like we're just going through the motions? $7
marriage.Neutral_8: I don't feel like doing anything today.
marriage.Bad_5: Look, I just want to be alone. Why did you marry me only to neglect me after? $a
marriage.Bad_6: Maybe it wasn't so bad being alone in the woods. $s
marriage.Bad_7: Sometimes I feel like you stopped caring about me. $s
marriage.Bad_8: It's miserable here. Something needs to change. $s
marriage.spring_1: Happy new year! No matter how long I live, I always love reflecting today and thinking of the year ahead. $h
marriage.spring_12: Be sure to win those eggs tomorrow honey! $u#$b#It's not about the eggs? Then why bother?
marriage.spring_22: It's my birthday! $h#$b#The butterflies chipped in and bought me some new paints!
marriage.spring_23: Are you going to the flower dance?
marriage.summer_10: This time of year is so lovely, the flowers, the bees, the butterflies.. I wish it was this beautiful year round
marriage.summer_27: The moonlight jellies are back tomorrow! $h
marriage.fall_1: Cosy season! We should get some hot cocoa in!
marriage.fall_15: There are games tomorrow right? $h#It sounds like such fun!
marriage.fall_26: I'm scared about tomorrow! $7#Keep me safe from the monsters! $7
marriage.winter_1: It's so cold! Are you looking forward to a break from farming?
marriage.winter_28: It's been a great year, @. We should celebrate a little! [(0)459] $h#$e#I'm sure next year will be even better. $9
2heart.1: I was just looking at this statue. $8
2heart.2: His name was Cannoli. He lived near here hundreds of years ago. $h
2heart.3: I never met him of course!
2heart.4: But my mother knew him as a child.
2heart.5: Fairies live a lot longer than humans.
2heart.6: Cannoli was very kind to fairies.
2heart.7: Like us he enjoyed sweet food and being surrounded by nature. $h
2heart.9: Sorry, I'm not feeling as cheerful as usual. $8
2heart.10: Thinking about my parents gets me down sometimes. $s
2heart.12: It's been 50 years since they passed. $s
2heart.13: Until you, I hadn't spoken to anyone in a really long time. $s
2heart.14: I really appreciate that you keep coming to see me. $8
2heart.15: I just hope I'm right to trust you. $8
2heart.16: I need to be alone for a little while now, but thank you for listening to me. $8
2heart.17: Hey @, thanks for listening to me earlier, it's nice to have you to talk to.
4heart.0: Can anyone tell me what kind of fish live in this water?
4heart.6: That's okay Vincent, how about you tell me what freshwater means?
4heart.7: Hi @, we were just talking about fish!
4heart.8: You fish right? Would you tell Jas and Vincent about what you've caught?
4heart.10: You saw me earlier didn't you? $7
4heart.11: I heard them in the forest, they seem gentle.
4heart.12: I think at some point I should learn to trust humans again.. $7
6heart.1: Come sit with me, I wanted to talk to you about something.
6heart.2: So you've probably noticed I have some concerns about humans.. $7
6heart.3: Well you need to know that humans and fairies have a complicated history..
6heart.4: Fairies have always sought to use magic to make the world better.
6heart.5: To grow plants, protect animals, and promote harmony in nature.
6heart.6: Humans however.. Humans often see magic as power. $8
6heart.7: Which means that sometimes, if they see an opportunity to gain magic, they might take it.. $8
6heart.9: He fell victim to this power grab.. $s
6heart.10: 80 years ago, he was taken from us.. $s
6heart.11: A woman took him and took all the magic she could from him. $s
6heart.12: When we found him he was... $s
6heart.14: After that I stayed away from humans. $8
6heart.16: When you started visiting me, I was worried. $8
6heart.18: Bringing gifts, talking to me, you were kind to my animals. $h
6heart.19: I think I'm ready to trust humans again.
6heart.21: That's.. that's what I wanted to say.
8heart.1: So I've been thinking a lot about what we spoke about..
8heart.2: I'm ready to join this community. $h
8heart.8: Actually Penny, I sent that note asking you to come.. $9
8heart.9: I wanted to meet you all. $9
8heart.10: H.. Hi Marigold, how do you know who I am?
8heart.11: I'm a friend of @, and.. and I've been watching you all in the forest. $7
8heart.12: I hope that doesn't seem creepy.. $7
8heart.13: I was trying to build up the courage to introduce myself..
8heart.17: Well no.. It's not something you learn, it's something you just are. $h
8heart.18: Like how a cow is a cow and a human is a human. $h
8heart.19: Can you teach me to fly? $1
8heart.20: Well you need wings to fly, but I can tell you what it's like to be a fairy?
8heart.23: Ok both of you, let be nice and quiet and listen to Marigold.
8heart.25: After meeting Penny, Jas and Vincent, I'm ready to slowly meet the rest of the town! $h
10heart-farm.0: Hi @. Listen, I have a date idea for tonight!#$b#Meet me outside my house at around 4pm?
10heart-greet.1: So.. To get to our date destination, I need to do something a little crazy..
10heart-greet.2: I'm gonna have to fly you there.. Do you trust me?
10heart-greet.5: I'm sorry you didn't feel comfortable flying with me.. $s
10heart-date.0: Amazing! Don't worry I'll take care of you! Hang on! $h
10heart-date.2: This is one of my favourite spots to fly out to! $9
10heart-date.3: It used to be a road into town, but it's gotten long overgrown.
10heart-date.4: I've set us up with a picnic! $h
10heart-date.6: I just want to say that the time I've spent with you has been really special.. $l
10heart-date.7: You've helped me to trust humans again and feel safe. $l
10heart-date.8: Now I know, not every human is going to use me for my magic, and a lot of humans are really after friendship and love. $l
10heart-date.10: Thanks for today, I love you so much! $l
Marigold.dislike: ...I don't know what to do with this
Marigold.hate: How.. How could you kill this and then give it to me
Marigold.neutral: That was very thoughtful of you.
mail.Community.title: Meet me later?
mail.Community.text: @,^I have a favour to ask you,^I'm doing something big, could you meet this afternoon in the community centre?  ^   -Marigold
mail.Warehouse.title: Meet me later?
mail.Warehouse.text: @,^I have a favour to ask you,^I'm doing something big, could you meet this afternoon in the Joja warehouse?  ^   -Marigold
mail.Library.title: Meet me later?
mail.Library.text: @,^I have a favour to ask you,^I'm doing something big, could you meet this afternoon at the library?  ^   -Marigold
